channel.title: Big Good Blog
channel.description: Insights, product updates, and analysis from the Big Good ecosystem — Ecomail, Topol, DMARCeye, and Lettr.

item.title: The DMARC Enforcement Gap: Why 68% of Domains Are Still Vulnerable in Q1 2026
item.author: Ondřej Caletka
item.description: A look at DMARC adoption trends in Q1 2026: which industries are lagging, what enforcement gaps exist, and why moving to p=reject matters now.

item.title: DMARCeye Goes Global: AI-Native DMARC Monitoring Is Here
item.author: DMARCeye Team
item.description: DMARCeye launches globally with AI-powered threat detection, real-time alerts, and a redesigned dashboard built for modern security teams.

item.title: Topol Builder v3: Smarter Templates, AI Assist, and a New Component Library
item.author: Topol Team
item.description: Topol Builder v3 ships with AI content suggestions, a refreshed component library, and a new collaboration mode for distributed teams.

item.title: Ecomail Hits 300,000 Active Users: What We Learned Building Email Infrastructure at Scale
item.author: Jakub Stupka
item.description: Ecomail reaches 300,000 active users. A look back at the architecture decisions, product bets, and team culture that got us here.
